ops.body: Deferred by user decision (2026-07-17 backlog train): the LenientToolUseBlock rework waits for the actual cc-transcript v14 release (latest tag is still v13.2.0). The current train (71b43f4 / 084b4db / 9b18c04) deliberately does not touch captain-hook's transcripts/signals surface. When v14 tags, resolve via (a) the pyclass regaining subclass upstream or (b) reworking LenientToolUseBlock to composition.
